creator: frank+ports@ilse.behrens.de
text:
ZKT is a tool to manage keys and signatures for DNSSEC-zones. The Zone Key Tool consists of two commands:
- dnssec-zkt to create and list dnssec zone keys and 
- dnssec-signer to sign a zone and manage the lifetime of the zone signing keys

See: http://www.hznet.de/dns/zkt/
